BadRequestException.description: Bad request exception thrown when the request is malformed or invalid

message.example: The request is invalid or malformed.

OtpInvalidException.description: Exception thrown when OTP is invalid or malformed

OtpMalformedException.description: Exception thrown when OTP format is invalid

OtpBadRequestException.description: Exception thrown when OTP request is malformed or missing required parameters

message.example: OTP request is malformed or missing required parameters

OtpExpiredException.description: Exception thrown when OTP has expired

UnauthorizedException.description: Unauthorized exception thrown when authentication is required but not provided or invalid

OtpRequiredException.description: Exception thrown when OTP is required but not provided

ForbiddenException.description: Forbidden exception thrown when access is denied due to insufficient permissions

UserInactiveException.description: User inactive exception thrown when a disabled or inactive user attempts an action

UserMobileNotVerifiedException.description: User mobile not verified exception thrown when a user with unverified mobile attempts an action requiring verification

message.example: User mobile number is not verified

UserEmailNotVerifiedException.description: User email not verified exception thrown when a user with unverified email attempts an action requiring verification

UserShouldChangePasswordException.description: User should change password exception thrown when user must update password before proceeding

UserSchemaInactiveException.description: Exception thrown when a user's assigned schema is inactive

UserSchemaNotAssignedException.description: Exception thrown when a user has no schema assigned

UserSchemaNotFoundException.description: Exception thrown when the specified user schema was not found

TooManyRequestsException.description: Too many requests exception thrown when a client has sent too many requests in a given amount of time (rate limiting)

message.example: Too many requests. Please try again later.

InternalServerErrorException.description: Internal server error exception thrown when an unexpected error occurs on the server

message.example: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

SbfMenuSideTreeItemResponseDto.description: Side menu item. Side items may contain nested side children.

children.description: Child menu items for the side location.

SbfMenuTopChildTreeItemResponseDto.description: Nested top menu item. Top children may be recursive but never expose the mega flag.

children.description: Child menu items for the top location. Nested children never expose mega.

SbfMenuTopTreeItemResponseDto.description: Top bar first-level menu item. Only root items in the top section use this DTO and may expose the mega flag.

children.description: Child menu items for the top location. Nested children never expose mega.

mega.description: Mega menu flag. Applies only to first-level top items where parentId is null.

SbfMenuTreeItemResponseDto.description: Base menu item shared by all menu locations. This DTO intentionally excludes recursive children and the mega flag.

SbfMenuTreeResponseDto.description: Menu tree grouped by placement section

fab.description: FAB section menus. These items never expose the mega flag.

side.description: Side section menus. These items may contain recursive side children.

tabs.description: Tabs section menus. These items never expose the mega flag.

top.description: Top section menus. First-level top items may expose the mega flag, while nested children use the top-child DTO without mega.
